## Technical Summary of Build Failure

The build failed during the Gradle execution phase, specifically when attempting to resolve dependencies for the `:app:debugRuntimeClasspath` configuration, which was invoked as part of the `:app:checkDebugAarMetadata` task.

**Root Cause:** The build process failed because Gradle could not locate a required dependency file named `:SymSpellKt-android-3.4.0:`. This dependency appears to be referenced locally via a `flatDir` repository configuration, but the expected file is missing or incorrectly named in the designated location.

**Specific Error Details:**

1.  **Failing Task:** `:app:checkDebugAarMetadata`
2.  **Error Message:**
    ```
    * What went wrong:
    Execution failed for task ':app:checkDebugAarMetadata'.
    > Could not resolve all files for configuration ':app:debugRuntimeClasspath'.
    >    > Could not resolve all dependencies for configuration ':app:debugRuntimeClasspath'.
    >       > Could not find :SymSpellKt-android-3.4.0:.
    >         Searched in the following locations:
    >           - file:/home/runner/work/Gboard/Gboard/app/libs/SymSpellKt-android-3.4.0.aar
    ```
3.  **Contextual Clues:**
    *   The error occurs during the dependency resolution phase (`Could not resolve all files for configuration...`).
    *   Gradle explicitly reports searching for the dependency in the local path: `/home/runner/work/Gboard/Gboard/app/libs/SymSpellKt-android-3.4.0.aar`.
    *   A warning was logged earlier during configuration that suggests the repository type used for this local dependency might be problematic: `WARNING: Using flatDir should be avoided because it doesn't support any meta-data formats.`

The build process terminated with exit code 1 after the Gradle task failed. The failure is due to a missing local artifact that the build script expects to find in the `app/libs` directory.

## Identified File Path(s) Causing the Error

The error points directly to a missing local artifact specified within the source structure, likely defined in the application module's build file (`build.gradle` or `build.gradle.kts` for `:app`).

private fun loadDebugView(): View {
        val scroll = ScrollView(this)
        scroll.layoutParams = ViewGroup.LayoutParams(ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT, ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT)
        scroll.background = android.graphics.drawable.ColorDrawable(if(isDarkTheme) 0xFF141414.toInt() else 0xFFECECEC.toInt())
        
        val content = LinearLayout(this)
        content.orientation = LinearLayout.VERTICAL
        content.paddingTop = 16
        content.paddingBottom = 16
        content.setPadding(20, 20, 20, 20)

        val title = TextView(this)
        title.text = "DEBUG CONSOLE"
        title.typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD
        title.textSize = 16f
        title.setTextColor(if(isDarkTheme) 0xFFFFFFFF.toInt() else 0xFF000000.toInt())
        content.addView(title)

        val controls = LinearLayout(this)
        controls.orientation = LinearLayout.HORIZONTAL
        
        val btnClear = Button(this)
        btnClear.text = "CLEAR"
        btnClear.setOnClickListener { 
            DebugLogger.clear()
            setInputView(loadDebugView()) // Refresh
        }
        
        val btnClose = Button(this)
        btnClose.text = "CLOSE"
        btnClose.setOnClickListener { setInputView(loadMainKeyboard()) }
        
        controls.addView(btnClear)
        controls.addView(btnClose)
        content.addView(controls)

        val logText = TextView(this)
        logText.text = DebugLogger.getLogs()
        logText.typeface = Typeface.MONOSPACE
        logText.textSize = 10f
        logText.setTextColor(0xFF00FF00.toInt())
        content.addView(logText)

        scroll.addView(content)
        // Set height
        val params = ViewGroup.LayoutParams(ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT, getKeyboardTotalHeight())
        scroll.layoutParams = params
        scroll.minimumHeight = getKeyboardTotalHeight()

        return scroll
    }

    </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<TextView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:id="@+id/emoji_text"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="50dp"
    android:gravity="center"
    android:textSize="24sp"
    android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
    android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/kb_bg">

    <!-- EMOJI GRID -->
    <GridView
        android:id="@+id/emoji_grid"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:numColumns="7"
        android:padding="4dp"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:scrollbarStyle="outsideOverlay"
        android:verticalSpacing="4dp"
        android:horizontalSpacing="4dp" />

    <!-- BOTTOM CONTROLS -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="50dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="4dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btn_back_abc"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1.5"
            android:layout_margin="3dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_key_normal"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="ABC"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textSize="14sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btn_space_emoji"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="4"
            android:layout_margin="3dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_key_normal"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="Space"
            android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"
            android:textSize="12sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btn_del_emoji"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1.5"
            android:layout_margin="3dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_key_normal"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="⌫"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textSize="18sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btn_enter_emoji"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1.5"
            android:layout_margin="3dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_key_action"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="↵"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textSize="18sp" />
    </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
